Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class UserEngagementSettings

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.MetadataForSettings
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.UserEngagementSettings
public class UserEngagementSettings extends MetadataForSettings

Java class for UserEngagementSettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="UserEngagementSettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}MetadataForSettings">
       <sequence>
         <element name="canGovCloudUseAdoptionApps" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="doesScheduledSwitcherRunDaily" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableCustomHelpGlobalSection" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableHelpMenuShowFeedback" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableHelpMenuShowHelp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableHelpMenuShowNewUser" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableHelpMenuShowSearch" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableHelpMenuShowSfdcContent" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableHelpMenuShowShortcut" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableHelpMenuShowSupport" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableHelpMenuShowTrailhead" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableIBILOptOutDashboards" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableIBILOptOutEvents" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableIBILOptOutReports" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableIBILOptOutTasks" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableLexToClassicFeedbackEnable" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableOrchestrationInSandbox" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableOrgUserAssistEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableScheduledSwitcher" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableSfdcProductFeedbackSurvey" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableShowSalesforceUserAssist" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isAutoTransitionDelayed" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isCrucNotificationDisabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isCustomProfileAutoTransitionDelayed" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isLEXWelcomeMatDisabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isMeetTheAssistantDisabledInClassic" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isMeetTheAssistantDisabledInLightning" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isSmartNudgesDisabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="optimizerAppEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

      public void setOptimizerAppEnabled(Boolean value)
      Sets the value of the optimizerAppEnabled property.
      Parameters:
      value - allowed object is Boolean
